title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say how much skill is involved in these activities and why the people might find them satisfying.

images.label: A
images.description: A potter shaping a clay bowl on a spinning pottery wheel.

images.label: B
images.description: A surgeon's hands performing a delicate operation using robotic tools.

images.label: C
images.description: A person carefully planting small seedlings in a garden bed.

followUp.question: Which of these tasks requires the most years of training? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the advantages of eating in these ways are and how the people might be feeling.

images.label: D
images.description: A person eating a quick sandwich while working at their computer desk.

images.label: E
images.description: A group of friends having a large, lively outdoor dinner party with many dishes.

images.label: F
images.description: A couple having a quiet, formal candlelit dinner in an elegant restaurant.

followUp.question: In which situation is it easiest to enjoy the food? (Why?)
